caption: A video presentation is displayed on a computer screen, featuring a slide titled "Introduction" within a "Rural Community Food System" presentation. The slide explores the question, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community source as local as possible from locally owned and operated to benefit the community." Below the text, a "Session Videos" section contains several links. A conceptual diagram on the right side of the slide shows arrows connecting "Availability," "Retailers willing to source local," "Product Cost/Price," and "Local Sustainable Consumption," with "26R Enriched system" positioned centrally. In the top right corner of the screen, a man with short brown hair and a beard, wearing a dark shirt, is visible in a small webcam window. The screen remains static throughout the frames, showing no changes in the slide's content or the man's appearance.
